FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class ComboBox

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

A WinUI ComboBox: a closed field showing the selected item + a chevron that opens a dropdown list (an anchored, light-dismiss overlay whose width matches the field). In Editable mode ONE chrome-owning box (the template's single Background border spanning BOTH grid columns, ComboBox_themeresources.xaml:571 Grid.ColumnSpan="2") hosts a chromeless EditableText spanning the full width (:580 ColumnSpan="2", BorderBrush="Transparent", padding ComboBoxEditableTextPadding 11,5,38,6 :342) with the 30-wide DropDownOverlay button (:581) and the 12×12 chevron glyph (:582–587) overlaid at the right — never a second bordered box. Selection is a caller Signal<T> so a page can read it.

1:1 with ComboBox_themeresources(_perf2026).xaml + ComboBoxHelper.cpp. Exact tokens/sizes: field MinHeight=32 (ComboBoxMinHeight), padding 12,5,0,7 (ComboBoxPadding), CornerRadius=4 (ControlCornerRadius), BorderThickness=1, MinWidth=64 (ComboBoxThemeMinWidth); the border is the ControlElevationBorder gradient (ComboBoxBorderBrush), pressed flattens to a flat stroke (ComboBoxBorderBrushPressed=ControlStrokeColorDefault). Field fills rest/hover/pressed/disabled = ControlFillColor Default/Secondary/Tertiary/Disabled; foreground ramps Primary→(pressed)Secondary→(disabled)Disabled; placeholder Secondary→(pressed)Tertiary. Chevron column width 38, glyph  12px, foreground TextFillColorSecondary, right-inset 14 (Margin 0,0,14,0).

Items (ComboBoxItem): padding 11,5,11,7 (ComboBoxItemThemePadding), margin 5,2,5,2, CornerRadius=3 (ComboBoxItemCornerRadius); the 3×16 left accent pill (ComboBoxItemPill, corner 1.5, fill AccentFillColorDefault, flush left — no margin in the ITEM template) shows only on the selected row. Item state matrix mirrors the XAML: rest=SubtleTransparent, PointerOver=SubtleSecondary, Pressed=SubtleTertiary; Selected=SubtleSecondary, SelectedPointerOver=SubtleTertiary, SelectedPressed=SubtleSecondary; foreground Primary, pressed→Secondary. Popup: AcrylicInApp background + SurfaceStrokeColorFlyout 1px + OverlayCornerRadius(8) + presenter margin 0,4 (ComboBoxDropdownContentMargin) + MaxDropDownHeight=504 with internal scroll — all supplied by the overlay host's FlyoutSurface; here we return only the rows.

Open/close = the overlay host's WinUI MenuPopupThemeTransition (250ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0,1) clip-reveal + opacity; 83ms close fade) — identical to OverlayOpeningAnimation/OverlayClosingAnimation (ControlNormal/Fast AnimationDuration). Focus is captured on open and restored on close by the host; the popup is opened with PopupOptions(FocusTrap:true) so Tab/arrow roving stays inside the list. Keyboard: when CLOSED, Up/Down/Home/End step the selection in place and Space/Enter/F4/Alt+Down open; when OPEN, Up/Down/Home/End move a highlighted row, Enter/Space commits it, Escape closes (restoring selection). Type-ahead jumps to the next item whose label starts with the typed prefix (WinUI ComboBox text-search), CLOSED or OPEN.

Corner-join (ComboBoxHelper.UpdateCornerRadius): while open-DOWN the field squares its BOTTOM corners so the dropdown reads as one piece with the field (the popup squares the abutting TOP corners host-side via the placement result's CornerJoin). The non-editable field overlaps the popup by design, so the join is applied while open.

Description

WinUI Description (DescriptionPresenter, generic.xaml:9233-9239): helper text below the field in SystemControlDescriptionTextForegroundBrush.

public string Description

Field Value

string

Editable 

public bool Editable

Field Value

bool

ErrorText

Input-validation error message (WinUI InputValidation InlineErrors state, generic.xaml:9118-9127): non-empty → the field border swaps to SystemControlErrorTextForegroundBrush and the message renders below the field (replacing the Description row, per the InlineErrors setters).

public string ErrorText

Field Value

string

Header

WinUI Header (HeaderContentPresenter, generic.xaml:9155-9166): a label row above the field, FontWeight Normal (ComboBoxHeaderThemeFontWeight), margin 0,0,0,4 (ComboBoxTopHeaderMargin, generic.xaml:5911).

public string Header

string

Field Value

float

OnSelectionChanged 

public Action<int>? OnSelectionChanged

Field Value

Action<int>

OnTextSubmitted

WinUI TextSubmitted with the Handled contract (ComboBoxTextSubmittedEventArgs): raised on commit (Enter / Tab / focus loss) when the typed text matched NO item during search (ComboBox_Partial.cpp:2487–2513). Return true = handled (the app accepted the custom value; the default matching is skipped); false/null → the default: exact-match the items case-insensitively and select on a hit (cpp:2516–2543), else the text stays as a custom value with SelectedIndex = −1.

public Func<string, bool>? OnTextSubmitted

Field Value

Func<string, bool>

OverlayButtonWidth 

public const float OverlayButtonWidth = 30

Field Value

float

PartChevron

The 12×12 DropDownGlyph cell (both modes). Owned: HitTestVisible (the glyph is decoration — the field / DropDownOverlay button owns the click).

public const string PartChevron = "Chevron"

Field Value

string

PartField

The field root — the template's Background border (editable: the single ColumnSpan=2 chrome box; non-editable: the closed field row). State fills/borders (rest/hover/pressed/focused/error ramps) are computed per render BEFORE the modifier — override at will. Owned: OnRealized (anchor capture, chained), OnClick (toggle, non-editable), OnKeyDown/OnCharInput/OnFocusChanged, Focusable, Role, Children (value label / TextBox part + overlay + glyph).

public const string PartField = "Field"

Field Value

string

PartItemPill

The 3×16 accent pill (ComboBoxItemPill), mounted only on the selected row. Owned: none.

public const string PartItemPill = "ItemPill"

Field Value

string

PartItemRow

One dropdown row (the ComboBoxItem LayoutRoot) — popup-built each open, NOT recycled, so per-row modifiers are safe. State fills (selected/cursor rest + hover/press ramp) are computed per render BEFORE the modifier. Owned: OnClick (commit), Role, Children (pill + content).

public const string PartItemRow = "ItemRow"

Field Value

string

Parts

Lightweight per-part styling (CSS ::part): modifiers keyed by the PartXxx consts; see TemplateParts for the contract.

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
